subcodes.first_line: In this day the entire world is illumined by the effulgent rays of this Manifestation, yet most of its inhabitants remain heedless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز جمیع عالم از تجلیات انوار ظهور منور ولکن اهل آن اکثری غافل اهل ارض کل
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @praise and encouragement
